strengths: Extensive fullstack experience with TypeScript, React, and Node.js across multiple domains
Proven ability to own end-to-end systems, from APIs to UIs and DevOps infrastructure
Strong open-source contributions and technical communication skills demonstrated through workshops and public projects
concerns: Job title inflation (e.g., 'Staff Software Engineer' at age 30 with inconsistent tenure) raises questions about true seniority level
Limited explicit mention of PostgreSQL, Nest.js, or AWS services directly tied to renewable energy/construction tech context
German language proficiency is only basic, while high on-site presence in Berlin is required
response.justification: Bogdan brings deep fullstack expertise in TypeScript, React, and scalable web systems with strong architectural discipline, but his limited German proficiency and lack of direct renewable energy domain experience may hinder on-site collaboration and contextual understanding, despite his technical capability.
